name: PIXEL_PORTFOLIO.exe
fullDesc: Personal portfolio website with a retro pixel-art/brutalist aesthetic. Features dark/light mode, gravity-physics fireworks, parallax pixel background, mouse trail effect, typewriter animation, and a dynamic project explorer. Zero dependencies — pure HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

name: SCHOOL_LIFE_SIM.bin
desc: 2D school-themed life sim in Godot (Stardew Valley style)
fullDesc: A 2D school-themed life simulator built with Godot 4. Inspired by Stardew Valley, featuring pixel-art aesthetics, daily school routines, relationship systems, and various extracurricular activities. Currently in active development.
